site.name: Zach Lamb
site.title: Senior Software Engineer
site.description: Senior Software Engineer specializing in React, TypeScript, and AI-powered web tools. Certified ScrumMaster with a Human Centered Computing background, building performant applications from cybersecurity platforms to e-commerce at scale.

hero.title: Zach Lamb
hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer
taglines: Full-stack engineer with a PM's instinct — always got a pulse on the latest AI tools and where they actually ship.
React, TypeScript, and LLM apps — with an eye for what to actually build.
Always up for a conversation about code, AI, the outdoors, or Oreos.

about.heading: Trail Guide
about.body: I'm a frontend-leaning full-stack engineer with over a decade of experience building web applications that people actually enjoy using. Currently, I'm at Circadence crafting AI-powered tools for cybersecurity professionals. Before that, I helped Starbucks store teams communicate better and built design systems at StellarFi. I'm a Certified ScrumMaster who believes great software comes from great processes and empathetic teams. When I'm not writing code, you'll find me teaching yoga, exploring Colorado's trails, lifting weights, or debating the best Oreo flavor.
about.focusAreas: React & TypeScript · Design systems · AI-powered tools · Certified ScrumMaster

contact.heading: Leave a Note at Camp
contact.intro: Whether it's about code, the trail ahead, or Oreos — drop a note and I'll get back to you from base camp. I typically reply within a day.
contact.name: Name
contact.successSub: Your message is on its way.
contact.fallbackError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

projects.intro: A handful of projects that show how I think about users, shipping, and where AI earns its keep.

privacy.pageDescription: How I handle information you share with this site — contact form data, analytics, and your rights under EU/UK privacy law.
privacy.draftBanner: If anything here is unclear or you have questions about how I handle your information, please email you@zachlamb.io.

atGlance.heading: At a glance
atGlance.body: This site collects the information you submit in the contact form — name, email, message — and nothing else. I don't run analytics that profile you.

whatICollect.heading: What I collect
whatICollect.contactForm: Contact form: the name, email address, and message you submit. These are only used to reply to you.
whatICollect.analytics: Aggregate, anonymous page metrics via Vercel Analytics. The script does not set cookies and does not build an individual profile of you.

whereItGoes.heading: Where it goes
whereItGoes.body: Your contact-form submission is sent through Resend, a US-based email delivery service, to my personal inbox. Nothing is written to a database.

retention.heading: How long I keep it
retention.body: Contact-form emails are retained for as long as our conversation is active and up to 24 months after the last reply, after which I delete them. You can ask for earlier deletion at any time. Vercel Analytics retains aggregate data per its own retention policy.

rights.heading: Your rights (EU/UK)
rights.body: If you are in the EU, UK, or another jurisdiction with equivalent privacy laws, you have the right to request access to the information I hold about you, to ask for corrections or deletion, to request portability, to object to processing, and to withdraw consent. I aim to respond within 30 days. To exercise any of these rights, use the contact form or email me directly at

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: I set a single functional cookie — NEXT_LOCALE — to remember your language preference. I do not set tracking, advertising, or third-party analytics cookies.

thirdParties.heading: Third parties
thirdParties.intro: This site relies on the following services that may process your information on my behalf:
thirdParties.note: Each has its own privacy policy, linked above. I don't share your information with anyone else.

contact.heading: Privacy questions
contact.body: For any privacy-related question, the fastest path is email:
